description: The Aston Martin Vanquish has spanned two generations. The original (2001-2007) featured a 5.9-litre V12 and was the Bond car in Die Another Day. The second generation (2012-2018) used a 6.0-litre V12 producing up to 595 bhp in S form. Both are flagship GT cars combining handbuilt craftsmanship with V12 performance.
